narrative:
Defiance City 4-A (precinct in Defiance County) has 902 registered voters, with 67.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
